description_long: This figure depicts an adult male with exaggerated, elongated limbs and angular body proportions, giving it a surreal and stylized appearance. The head is bald with a full beard and mustache, and the facial expression is stern. The upper body is draped in a garment with sharp, wing-like extensions, while the lower body features tight-fitting pants with a visible belt buckle. The feet are clad in boots with prominent cuffs, and the arms and legs are unnaturally stretched and bent, creating a dynamic, almost contorted pose. The overall surface has a glossy, painted texture with a mix of dark and reddish hues, and the figure appears to be in mid-motion, as if leaping or suspended.
description: A stylized adult male with elongated limbs, angular features, and a dramatic, contorted pose, wearing a sharp-shouldered garment and boots.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the figure are visible, highlighting the sharp, wing-like garment, the bearded face, and the extended left leg and arm.
description_view_1: The left profile is shown, focusing on the side of the head, the bent left leg, and the angular extension of the garment.
description_view_2: The rear and lower body are visible, emphasizing the back of the pants, the belt buckle, and the boots, with less detail on the face.
description_view_3: The right side and back are shown, displaying the angular garment, the back of the head, and the dynamic bend of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved angular tunic with exaggerated shoulders and fitted pants
attribute_hairstyle: bald with full beard and mustache
